**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Jingyang Automation System Co., Ltd. presents an extreme structural mutation, transforming from a foreign-invested automation manufacturer into a radically diversified asset-holding and service shell. Originally named 'Sanneng Jingyang Automation' with a substantial paid-in capital of 16.76 million RMB, it currently reports an absolute collapse in workforce (only 4 insured employees in 2024). A forensic review of its business scope reveals a staggering pivot: while retaining legacy tags for 'Mechanical/Electrical Equipment', it has obtained explicit licensing for 'Catering Services', 'Medical Aesthetics', 'Elderly Care', and 'Property Management'. This confirms the entity has completely abandoned heavy industrial manufacturing. The 4 remaining employees likely manage its legacy physical assets (real estate) at No. 8 Puliu Road, leasing them out to commercial operators (clinics, restaurants, parking lots) while serving as a legal shell for diversified foreign or domestic investments.
